news.t: Inspire's U.S. large-cap ETF (NYSE: BIBL) celebrates 6th year of providing an option for faith-based investors
Can a Biblical ETF Stand Up to the S&P 500?
These are the ETFs with the most exposure to the year's best-performing stock

holdings.infoBox: BIBL is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Caterpillar stock at 8.85%, KLA Corporation at 6.91%, Arista Networks at 4.76%, Amphenol at 4.35%, and Welltower at 3.33%.

overview.description: The Inspire 100 ETF (BIBL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Inspire 100 index, a market-cap-weighted index of large-cap US stocks, selected based on a proprietary definition of biblical values. BIBL was launched on Oct 30, 2017 and is issued by Inspire.
